creator: maya@negeta.com
text:
I cannot make ports/apr with error.
buildconf says 'pyhton not found',
but ports finds /usr/local/bin/python2.5.

How-To-Repeat: /usr/ports/devel/apr# grep PYTHON /etc/make.conf
PYTHON_VERSION=python2.5
/usr/ports/devel/apr# make APR_UTIL_WITHOUT_GDBM=yes APR_UTIL_WITHOUT_BERKELEY_DB=yes
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.5 - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on executable in : gmake - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.8.8 - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/automake19 - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/autoconf259 - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/libtool - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on shared library: expat.6 - found
===>   apr-1.2.8_1 depends on shared library: iconv.3 - found
===>  Configuring for apr-1.2.8_1
/bin/cp -f /usr/ports/Templates/config.guess /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-1.2.8/build/config.guess
/bin/chmod a+rx /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-1.2.8/build/config.guess
/bin/cp -f /usr/ports/Templates/config.sub /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-1.2.8/build/config.sub
/bin/chmod a+rx /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-1.2.8/build/config.sub
/bin/cp -f /usr/ports/Templates/config.guess /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-util-1.2.8/build/config.guess
/bin/chmod a+rx /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-util-1.2.8/build/config.guess
/bin/cp -f /usr/ports/Templates/config.sub /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-util-1.2.8/build/config.sub
/bin/chmod a+rx /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-util-1.2.8/build/config.sub
cd /usr/ports/devel/apr/work/apr-1.2.8 ;  /usr/bin/env PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python2.5" SHELL=/bin/sh CONFIG_SHELL=/bin/sh MAKE=gmake PATH=/usr/local/libexec/automake19:/usr/local/libexec/autoconf259:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/X11R6/bin:/usr/local/jdk1.4.2/bin:/usr/local/pgsql/bin:/home/maya/portutil ACLOCAL=/usr/local/bin/aclocal19 AUTOMAKE=/usr/local/bin/automake19 AUTOCONF=/usr/local/bin/autoconf259 AUTOHEADER=/usr/local/bin/autoheader259 AUTOIFNAMES=/usr/local/bin/ifnames259 AUTOM4TE=/usr/local/bin/autom4te259 AUTORECONF=/usr/local/bin/autoreconf259 AUTOSCAN=/usr/local/bin/autoscan259 AUTOUPDATE=/usr/local/bin/autoupdate259 LIBTOOL=/usr/local/bin/libtool LIBTOOLIZE=/usr/local/bin/libtoolize LIBTOOL_M4=/usr/local/share/aclocal/libtool.m4 lt_cv_sys_max_cmd_len=262144 /bin/sh ./buildconf
buildconf: checking installation...
buildconf: python not found.
           You need python installed
           to build APR from SVN.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/apr.
